title: Vocal Register Switching Mechanism
brief: A humorous but technical engineering diagram showing vocal register switching like a network router or API gateway. Three horizontal lanes labeled '胸腔共鸣 (Chest Voice)', '混声区 (Mixed Voice)', '头声/哨声 (Head Voice/Whistle)'. Show a vocal signal packet traveling through these lanes with 'switch' gates between them. Include technical annotations like 'Latency: 0ms', 'Packet Loss: 0%', 'Bandwidth: 3 Octaves'. A small warning sign says 'WARNING: 95% of singers encounter 503 Gateway Error at B5'. Dark background with neon green and amber network-style graphics. Title: 'FIGURE 6: 声区路由架构图 (Vocal Register Routing Architecture)'. Mix DevOps/infrastructure aesthetic with vocal anatomy humor.
prompt:

Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-2k. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
